name: aps-conformance-suite
description: Cross-implementation test corpus for the Agent Passport System protocol. Byte-identical JCS canonicalization fixtures, deterministic Ed25519 signatures, OWASP AIVSS §3.6 scenario fixtures, instruction-provenance vectors. Apache-2.0.

scripts.test: npm run verify && npm run test:canonical-bytes && npm run verify:envoys-rfc9421 && npm run verify:a2a-1496-negative-paths && npm run verify:sk-function-invocation && npm run verify:aae-envelope && npm run verify:two-wrapper-attribution && npm run verify:accountability-record && npm run verify:read-fidelity-receipt
